Dazai ⤵

≫ Port Mafia Executive
≫ Has very little desire to become the PM boss because of the responsibility (and he sees little value in life or trying)
≫ He smokes (probably borrowed a few from 𝖢𝗁𝗎𝗎𝗒𝖺 and got hooked)
≫ 𝖬𝗈𝗋𝗂 has become paranoid that Dazai might try to assassinate him to take his position.

𝖮𝖽𝖺𝗌𝖺𝗄𝗎 ⤵

≫ Not mentioned in the scripting, as it will cause the JLLM to mention his name.
